title: Melted Mediterranean Ground Pork Wrap
description: A fresh, glassy-jelly wrap filled with seasoned ground pork, feta, roasted red pepper and herbs, served in a cozy corn husk for a crowd-pleasing Mediterranean keto treat.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and sauté ground pork until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add salt, crushed pepper flakes, and lemon juice to the pork, cooking until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Stir in roasted red peppers, basil, and feta cheese, cooking until the cheese melts and sauce becomes glossy, about 4 minutes.
Remove skillet from heat and fold in goat cheese and mint until well combined.
While the filling is still hot, spoon generous portions onto soaked corn husks, forming small bowls.
Fold the sides of each husk over the filling and roll tightly to enclose the contents.
Place the wrapped husks in a steamer basket and steam for 6 minutes to heat through and soften the husk.
Serve immediately, optionally drizzled with a squeeze of lemon or a sprinkle of fresh herbs, and enjoy the melt and crunch.
